data.title: Quantum threat escalates: Google research claims Bitcoin could be cracked in 9 minutes.
data.description: A recent study by Google's quantum AI team shows that by optimizing Shor's Algorithm, Bitcoin private keys can be derived within 9 minutes using approximately 500,000 physical qubits, a time close to the block generation cycle, presenting a realistic attack window. The study also points out that approximately 6.9 million BTC are potentially at risk due to exposed public keys, indicating that quantum attacks are moving from theory to engineering. Meanwhile, ChainXGlobal's ByteVault post-quantum hardware wallet has been officially released and is available for global sale, and is integrated into the ChainX Vault application, providing a quantum-secure asset management solution.

data.title: Across Protocol Proposes Transition to U.S. C Corporation
data.description: Across has announced that a proposal for ACX token equity trading and acquisition is now available. According to Foresight News, the proposal seeks approval to transform the Across protocol from a token-based decentralized autonomous organization structure to a U.S. C corporation. ACX token holders have seven days to cast their votes on the proposal.

data.title: Qivalis Plans Euro Stablecoin Launch Pending Regulatory Approval
data.description: Qivalis, supported by 12 European banks such as ING, UniCredit, and BBVA, is preparing to launch a euro stablecoin compliant with the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation. According to NS3.AI, the launch is contingent upon obtaining regulatory approval. CEO Jan-Oliver Sell stated that the project is targeting the second half of the year, subject to licensing timelines with the Dutch central bank.

data.title: A whale held HYPE tokens for 1.2 years, then sold 110,400 tokens, making a profit of $1.608 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0x284b...81c7) sold 110,400 HYPE tokens at an average price of $36.74 after holding them for 1.2 years, obtaining $4.06 million in USDC and making a profit of $1.608 million. This whale initially purchased 107,700 HYPE tokens for $2.45 million and used them for staking.

data.title: Ripple USD Reserves Surpass Circulating Supply, Deloitte Audit Reveals
data.description: Deloitte has completed a reserve audit for Ripple USD, revealing that the reserves exceed the circulating supply. According to NS3.AI, a certificate dated March 26 indicated approximately $1.568 billion in reserves against around 1.495 billion RLUSD in circulation. The certificate confirmed that the reserves surpassed the circulating supply as of the end of February. The report also noted that the reserve structure appears to comply with the guidelines set by the New York State Department of Financial Services.

data.title: Memescope Monday Fails to Boost Memecoin Trading Despite Volume Increase
data.description: Memescope Monday did not succeed in revitalizing memecoin trading, even though the memecoin launchpad associated with the event reported a 78% increase in daily volume compared to the previous day. According to NS3.AI, token creation on the platform surged by 83%. However, RASMR noted that the top trader of the day earned approximately $24,000, which is significantly lower than previous leaderboard figures exceeding $500,000.

data.title: USD/JPY Falls Below 159 Amid Daily Decline
data.description: The USD/JPY exchange rate has dropped below 159, experiencing a daily decline of 0.43%. According to ChainCatcher, this movement in the currency pair reflects ongoing fluctuations in the foreign exchange market.

data.title: Economist Warns of Uncertain Eurozone Inflation Trajectory
data.description: According to Jin10, Capital Economics economist Andrew Kenningham stated in a report that despite the eurozone experiencing its largest monthly inflation increase since the end of 2022, the data does not clearly indicate how high prices will rise or how energy prices will impact broader inflation metrics. The overall inflation rate rose from 1.9% in February to 2.5% in March, primarily driven by fuel price increases. There is significant uncertainty regarding the transmission of energy prices to core and services inflation, as well as the European Central Bank's policy response. Kenningham predicts that by the end of 2026, overall inflation could rise to nearly 4%, with core inflation approaching 3%, largely depending on the duration of the Iran war. He suggests that both indicators might decline again in 2027.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 610 USDT with a 1.11% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 31, 2026, 15:28 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 610 USDT and is now trading at 609.969971 USDT, with a narrowed 1.11% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Resolv co-founder: No evidence of insider wrongdoing found; USR holders before the incident will receive a 1:1 redemption guarantee.
data.description: Resolv co-founder Ivan answered questions from the community regarding the handling of the vulnerability incident, specifically: 1. Why were whitelisted USR users allowed priority redemption? Resolv answered: These wallets have been verified, allowing the team to process them manually within 24 hours to minimize further impact on the wider market. Currently, 98% of these redemptions have been completed. 2. What can non-whitelisted users who held USR before the vulnerability occur expect? Resolv answered: A 1:1 redemption guarantee. The team is finalizing the corresponding technical redemption plan. 3. Was this an inside job? Resolv answered: The investigation in conjunction with Mandiant and ZeroShadow is ongoing. As of now, no evidence of insider involvement has been found. 4. What about USR holders, LPs, and RLP holders who purchased USR after the vulnerability occurred? Resolv answered: The remaining steps will involve multi-party coordination at the legal, technical, and ecosystem levels, requiring collaboration with numerous counterparties. There is no single, obvious solution here, only a series of options that require trade-offs. The team's goal is to find the most balanced possible outcome. 5. How long will it take for the full recovery plan to be completed? Resolv's answer: The team is proceeding at the fastest possible speed while remaining responsible.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF Sees Influx While Ethereum and Solana ETFs Experience Outflows
data.description: Bitcoin ETFs have experienced a net inflow of 1,090 BTC. According to ChainCatcher, Ethereum ETFs have seen a net outflow of 4,079 ETH, while Solana ETFs have recorded a net outflow of 72,525 SOL. These movements reflect the shifting dynamics in the cryptocurrency ETF market.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Comments on Duration of Potential Conflict with Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that a potential conflict with Iran would not last "too long." According to NS3.AI, the statement did not outline any new operational steps, timelines, or specific policy actions related to the situation.

data.title: Bitfarms to Liquidate Bitcoin Holdings and Transition to AI Infrastructure
data.description: Bitfarms has announced its decision to sell its entire Bitcoin holdings, totaling 1,827 BTC, as part of a strategic shift towards AI infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, the company is developing a 2.2-gigawatt AI and high-performance computing data center pipeline, with plans to generate revenue from AI by 2027. Additionally, shareholders have approved relocating the company's registration to the United States and renaming it to Keel Infrastructure. The stock is anticipated to trade under the ticker KEEL around April 1, 2026.

data.title: Bitfarms plans to liquidate all Bitcoin on its balance sheet and fully shift its focus to AI infrastructure.
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Bitfarms (BITF) confirmed in its Q4 earnings call that it has begun selling its Bitcoin holdings and plans to continue selling until it reaches zero Bitcoin on its balance sheet. CEO Ben Gagnon stated that the company will sell Bitcoin "opportunistically when the market is strong," while continuing to operate its mining business to "maximize free cash flow before selling mining equipment." According to data from BitcoinTreasuries.net, Bitfarms currently holds 1,827 BTC and realized $28.2 million in revenue from Bitcoin sales in 2025. Bitfarms is advancing its 2.2 GW AI and high-performance computing data center development pipeline, aiming to generate AI-driven revenue starting in 2027. The company's shareholders have approved moving its registered office to the United States and changing its name to Keel Infrastructure (KEEL), expected to be completed around April 1, 2026, at which time the stock will trade under the ticker symbol KEEL. BITF's stock price rose 4.6% on Tuesday.

data.title: After two years of silence, a whale deposited 600 BTC, worth $40.41 million, into Binance.
data.description: According to Lookonchain's monitoring, a whale (bc1qh4) that had been dormant for two years deposited 600 BTC, worth $40.41 million, into Binance.

data.title: Trump: War with Iran won't last "too long"
data.description: US President Trump: War with Iran will not last "too long." (Jinshi)

data.title: Mercado Libre to Discontinue Mercado Coin in April
data.description: Mercado Libre has announced that it will phase out its digital currency, Mercado Coin, on April 17. According to NS3.AI, users will no longer be able to buy, sell, or earn cashback in the token after this date. Mercado Coin, which was launched in August 2022, has been available for transactions through Mercado Pago. Users have the option to sell the token, use it for purchases, or wait for its automatic conversion into local fiat currency.

data.title: Air Canada CEO's French Language Controversy Sparks Debate in Quebec
data.description:
Air Canada CEO's recent comments regarding the French language have ignited a significant debate in Quebec. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the controversy that arose after the CEO's remarks were perceived as dismissive towards the importance of French in the province. This incident has touched a nerve in Quebec, where language is a sensitive and politically charged issue.

The CEO's comments have drawn criticism from various quarters, including political leaders and language advocates, who argue that such statements undermine efforts to preserve and promote the French language in Quebec. The backlash underscores the ongoing tensions surrounding language rights and cultural identity in the region.

In response to the criticism, Air Canada has issued a statement reaffirming its commitment to bilingualism and the importance of French in its operations. The company emphasized its dedication to serving customers in both official languages and supporting the linguistic diversity of its workforce.

This incident has reignited discussions about the role of language in Quebec's society and the responsibilities of corporations operating in the province. It also highlights the broader cultural and political dynamics at play in Canada, where language remains a key element of national identity and unity.

data.title: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Targets U.S. Companies in Retaliation
data.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has announced plans to target U.S. companies in the region as a form of retaliation for attacks against Iran. According to Odaily, this decision will take effect starting April 1. The move is seen as a response to ongoing tensions and conflicts involving Iran and the United States.

data.title: Iranian state media announced that, in retaliation for attacks against Iran, US companies in the region will be targeted starting April 1.
data.description: According to Iranian state media, the Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced that, in retaliation for attacks against Iran, it will target US companies in the region starting April 1st. (Jinshi)
